description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by lush greenery, featuring a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray stone or brick, with large windows on multiple sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the bungalow has a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by manicured shrubs and a small garden. The property is bordered by several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as bedrooms and bathrooms. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on simplicity and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light gray stone exterior, large windows, and surrounded by trees and gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, garden, and open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, stone exterior, and rear garden area with additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, green lawn, and dense tree coverage for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with driveway, more trees, and a glimpse of the interior through the windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple sides
